payload.answer: There is a possible status transition conflict. The existing memory says the Brain Slack agent is planned and open, while the new information says the Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented. If the MVP implementation means the previously planned/open project has progressed, approve_supersession can be used. If the MVP is only a separate milestone or partial implementation while the broader agent project remains open, keep_both can be used. If the new statement is inaccurate, reject_new can be used. If the wording needs clarification, edit can be used.
citations: Existing project state: The Brain Slack agent is planned, status=open.
New: The Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented.

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement may be a temporal status update for the existing Brain Slack agent project, but it specifically refers to the MVP, which may be a component or milestone rather than the whole project.
